MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-20-2010 IN DEPT. 220, PLAINTIFF MILTON AND DELORIS TURNER'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERNCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(D). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 8/23/10 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 8/17/106 @ 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 603. PLAINTIFF'S DEMAND IS DUE BY 8/05/10, AND DEFENDANTS' RESPONSES DUE BY 8/16/10. MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DEADLINE IS 15 DAYS NOTICE WITHOUT ADDITIONAL DAYS OF ESERVICE. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE THE NAMES AND ADDRESSES OF ALL IDENTIFICATION AND LAY WITNESSES, AND PRODUCE ANY DOCUMENTS THAT SUPPORT THEIR TESTIMONY, AS TO EACH INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT BY 30 DAYS AFTER THE GRANTING OF PREFERENCE. ALL DEFENDANTS SHALL DISCLOSE THE NAMES AND ADDRESSES OF ALL LAY WITNESSES THAT THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT LEARNED OF THROUGH ITS OWN DISCOVERY EFFORTS AND THAT WILL RELY ON PROP. 51 PURPOSES OR FOR THEIR AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES, AND PRODUCE ANY DOCUMENTS UPON WHICH THESE WITNESSES SUPPORT, AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 50 DAYS AFTER THE GRANTING OF PREFERENCE. ALL ECONOMIC EXPERT DISCOVERY IS TO BE COMPLETED 14 CALENDAR DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, INCLUDING DEPOSITION OF ECONOMIC EXPERT. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE FAXED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. THE COURT REQUIRES THAT PLAINTIFF BE AVAILABLE FOR DEPOSITION FOR 2ND SERVED DEFENDANTS BY 7/1/10. ECONOMIC EXPERT REPORTS AND DESIGNATION OF EXPERTS ON KIDNEY CANCER MEDICAL CAUSATION DUE BY 7/1/10. IF PLAINTIFF IS OR WAS RECENTLY HOSPITALIZED, PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE BERRY & BERRY WITH INFORMATION ON THE LOCATION AND AUTHORIZATION OF THOSE RECORDS BY THE END OF THE DAY ON 5/21/10. THE COURT SET A HEARING ON 6/2/10 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 220 FOR STATUS ON PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION FOR SECOND SERVED DEFENDANTS, SCOPE OF PERCIPIENT DISCOVERY, STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS, AND ANY OTHER ISSUES.
